model.heading: Event Name
model.subheading: Please fill out the form, and we will include you on the guest list. You will receive the invitation by email. We can't wait to see you!

model.error: This field must contain a valid e-mail address.

title.text: How did you hear about the event?

model.text: We will be waiting for you here:
